feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Testing and Analysis
feed.subtitle: ABAP Testing and Analysis Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Break point in implicit enhancement not triggering
entry.content: I am facing some issue that I put a break point in implicit enhancement and in that I have include and there has written the logic and I also put break point in the include while saving it and it is triggering and it is not taking me to inside of include and how to debug in the include logic

entry.title: how to find field value that coming from table
entry.content: I need to find that where field value is coming from and how to debug it to find the value. please tell me the steps to find it and In VA03, I need to find field value of SHIP TO PARTY which table it is coming from and i checked vbpa table also that i did not find there and please refer below screenshot.

entry.title: Ship to party name3 update
entry.content:
I need to update ship to party header details in outbound delivery that I need to update using BADI. Can anyone suggest BADI for this

In the name1 field I need to find where it is coming from that I put the break point and but It is not triggering and tell me how to find that in correct way in debugging

entry.title: MB21 Item-Text mandatory
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a requirement to make Item-Text field to be mandatory whenever Movement Type and Plant meet a certain value.

For example when I add the material, the text field in image below need to be mandatory whenever Movement Type = 201 and Plant = P101.

Is this requirement can be added to the system?

Thank you.

entry.title: SM58 issue - DEBMAS05 is not Registered function : # Resgitered Function are : ZPROJEC
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have configured some MATMAS, DEBMAS and created a custom Idoc for Project details.

Recently there was a RFC connection issue and it resolved. after that we triggered Porjects custom Idoc ZPROJECT and after that triggered MATMAS and DEBMAS.

Projects custom Idoc sent to target system properly, but not the MATMAS and DEBMAD.

After some analysis, we observed that there are some errors in SM58 and the error message shows as 'DEBMAS05 is not Registered function : # Resgitered Function are : ZPROJEC' and 'MATMAS05 is not Registered function : # Resgitered Function are : ZPROJEC'.

Please advice that how to resolve the issue.

Thanks in advance.

Thanks & Regards,

Suresh

entry.title: shipping point not determining through IDoc
entry.content:
it is not redetermining the shipping point correctly through edi interface idoc and when we create sales order item manually It is determining shipping point correctly and it is picking proposed shipping point based on combination plant, group, shipping conditon in olv2 tcode and is there any user exit to write the logic to populate it correct shipping point . I checked in debugging It is picking up from the standard SAP and how to find that where this value is coming from and any user exit, enhancement is there tell me

I want to know that where vbap data is coming from and vbak-vstel in enhancement and I checked in debugging but i have not found and please help me

entry.title: How to include watermark in all the sapscripts without modifying indivdually
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Please share some ideas on how to apply a watermark on All SAP Script forms without modifying the SAP Scripts individually. Do we have any enhancement possible?

Thanks

K

entry.title: Locating the Logic for Role-Based License Assignment in SAP ABAP for dev
entry.content: Hello, according to my apprenticeship I would like to know in which function or program is the logic located that analyzes the roles and permissions of a user and assigns a license type according to these details? Thank you for your help and answers.

entry.title: VA01 Additional Tab B - Custom field enhancement giving issue
entry.content:
I have enhanced program SAPMV45A screen 8309 Additional Data B to add custom field Output Flag. while creating the Order using VA01, after enhancement when selecting the value in custom field and clicking on Back button it is not rendering correct screen which should SO overview screen with all the fields.

going to Display Header Details and passing value in Custom field added in Additional Data B

from this screen when clicking on BACK button it is displaying below screen which is wrong one.

It should display the first screen like below.

your input will be very much helpful.

Thanks in Advance!!

Jugal

entry.title: miniSAP license renewal: Login required but not working
entry.content:
I'm trying to get a new license from https://go.support.sap.com/minisap/#/minisap. I've done this many times before without any problems. Now you need to login first, before you can go to the password generation form. This login always fails. I'm trying to do this with a valid account, which I can use e.g. for downloading the trial sources. But when I try to logon, after three or four attempts the page appears with an empty "Available SAP Systems for Windows & Linux" List. What am I doing wrong? Is there a new Web page for generating a new license key?

Is someone able to confirm that there is a problem with this support page?

Thanks for any response in advance!

entry.title: Getting DUMP CX_RSR_X_MESSAGE
entry.content: I am getting dump and when I run the DTP then data packets are failing and I checked in ST22 dump occured. Please tell me how to resolve the issue.

entry.title: Please help to provide guidelines and/or Tool for Performance Test (SF Learning)
entry.content:
Dear members,

Our client for SuccessFactors Learning is requesting us to provide Guidelines for Performance Testing. Could you please suggest any document or tool related? Thank you so much

entry.title: Error installing AS ABAP 7.52 SP04, Developer Edition
entry.content:
Dear all,

I am trying to install the AS ABAP 7.52 SP04, Developer Edition.

https://blogs.sap.com/2019/10/01/as-abap-7.52-sp04-developer-edition-concise-installation-guide/

https://www.sap.com/documents/2019/09/32638f18-687d-0010-87a3-c30de2ffd8ff.html
https://abapacademy.com/blog/how-to-install-free-sap-system/


However, I am not successful, first I got this error message:


I fixed this by putting the license in the main folder as well, as described on this post:


https://blogs.sap.com/2016/11/03/linux-for-newbies-installing-opensuse-on-oracle-virtualbox/


But still i cant start the server, you see some parts are gray and not all processes are green.

Also attached you can see my log files, if you need more please let me know.


In the official SAP manual this part inst clear, do i need to specify a server, or is just 8080 enough?



Same for this part, which IP address i should add for the proxy? Or dont change it.

Also there is a mistake in the official SAP manual, the txt and the image they dont match. What is the right line?Because on this link i find it different information:


SAP AS ABAP 7.52 SP04 (Trial) Dev Edition Issues and Lessons | SAP Blogs


Please let me know if you need more, and how i cant get the sever working. Thank you for helping me out!!!

install-2024-01-02-20-20-10.txt

install-2024-01-03-11-01-53.txt

entry.title: SAP NetWeaver AS ABAP Developer Edition 7.52 SP04 - Download not possible
entry.content:
Hello to all,

I have a problem with the downloading of the installation package of the SAP NetWeaver AS ABAP Developer Edition 7.52 SP04. When I try to download the files I'm getting a pop-up with the notice that I access premium content and that I have to provide my e-mail to get started. I'm already logged in to my account. If I am entering my e-mail address und push next nothings happen.

Coud maybe someone explain me, what I'm doing wrong and how I can get it done to download the files.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: ADT VC++ 12.0 Version
entry.content:
Hi,

I've read the instructions to install ADT and it states, that precisely VC++12.0 is requiered. Since these packages are targeted, I believe you can't just install the latest version.

The problem is, that this version is reaching the end of extended support in April 2024 (a few months), my supervisor is declinig the installation request because of this.

Does anyone know when the VC++ version is going to be "updated" to a newer version?

entry.title: Grc request workflow
entry.content: Hi I have a problem in grc request, the request came to admin_detour because some approves are missing and I need to see complete stage of particular request workflow so I can find who is inactive in previous path.As it is in admin_detour we are only able to pending approver as our names but I need to see previous path approvers details,is there any log we can get to see complete log for particular grc request

entry.title: Execute JavaScript method( window.open ) from ABAP
entry.content:
Hi All ! 

Is it possible to execute JavaScript Method 'window.open' with ABAP? 
I've checked the demo program( DEMO_JAVA_SCRIPT_MINI_EDITOR ) and class( CL_JAVA_SCRIPT ) provided by SAP, but seems that it doesn't work.
( It seems that the JS was compiled, but not executed )

I'd like to refresh Groupware Web Page after the transaction executed on Web Gui pop-up
and the groupware web page manager asked me to execute JS method since the domain of groupware 
and web gui are different. And that's the only possible way at the moment.

In short, I'd like to confirm whether JS code can be executed on AP server which is NOT ABAP.
Or is there any other way besides what was mentioned above? 
I am trying with other class cl_gui_html_viewer  any way 😂

Please help! 
Thanks! 😀

entry.title: ATC Configurator app F4712 - Target not found error
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm trying to enable ATC configurator app in the BTP ABAP (Free tier) environment.  Followed the below help page to enable this app.  

Enable Usage of the ABAP Test Cockpit Configurator App | SAP Help Portal

The app is visible but on clicking on the app, it gives the below error.

Target was not found.Error: adding element with duplicate id 'nw.core.aps.atc.config::sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ListReport.view.ListReport::configuration--action::'

Is there any other additional authorization to be added for this app to work?  If any of you have faced this and resolved this error.  

This is only happening for this app, other apps like ATC exemptions, Custom code migration app are working fine.

entry.title: Skipping invoice creation in background batch job (using program SDBILLDL)
entry.content:
While creating an invoice through SDBILLDL via job - we have to check error log. If any error is there while creating invoice, we should restrict the system not to create an invoice for that particular document and should continue for the rest of the documents. Also, that error message should be displayed in batch job log.

Here is an example:

Delivery documents: say 1,2,3

1-Invoice should generate

2-Invoice should not get generate because there is an error in line Item Material

3-Invoice should generate.

entry.title: Generate token using authorization tab error
entry.content:
Hi,

I have an API to generate token and when executing form postman I am passing the username and password in the authorization tab and passing some grant type in body tab from postman and generating the token successfully. But when I am writing the same from ABAP it is not working. Experts, can you please suggest if I am missing something.

Thanks in advance
